TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_framework
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores the list of credit frameworks and their configuration

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: System of category context for framework management access control, will also be used for multi-tenancy

FIELD.NAME: name
FIELD.COMMENT: Full name of the framework

FIELD.NAME: idnumber
FIELD.COMMENT: External identifier - globally unique

FIELD.NAME: description
FIELD.COMMENT: Description of the framework intended use

FIELD.NAME: publicaccess
FIELD.COMMENT: If not public then user has to have manage framework capability to see and use the framework

FIELD.NAME: requiredcredits
FIELD.COMMENT: Credits required for completion

FIELD.NAME: restrictafter
FIELD.COMMENT: Not null means aggregation restricted to date later than timestamp

FIELD.NAME: restrictcontext
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 means aggregate credits in context and subcontexts, 0 means all contexts

FIELD.NAME: archived
FIELD.COMMENT: Archived frameworks are hidden, cannot be added to programs and credits cache is purged

FIELD.NAME: windowdays
FIELD.COMMENT: Rolling window in days. 0 = no window (fixed/anniversary). 730 = 24-month rolling.

FIELD.NAME: cycledays
FIELD.COMMENT: Full cycle length in days for proration. 0 = no proration. 730 = 2-year cycle.

FIELD.NAME: proratejoins
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 = prorate required credits for mid-cycle joiners. 0 = full requirement for all.

INDEX.NAME: idnumber
INDEX.COMMENT: Enforce unique idnumber for all frameworks if defined

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_field
TABLE.COMMENT: Custom fields associated with credit framework

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_completion
TABLE.COMMENT: Cached completions for each custom field - to speed up aggregation in programs or elsewhere

FIELD.NAME: instanceid
FIELD.COMMENT: matches customfield_data.instanceid

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: User who completed something

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Relevant context id

FIELD.NAME: timecompleted
FIELD.COMMENT: Completion time copied from course completion or elsewhere

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_credit
TABLE.COMMENT: Cached obtained credits for each user that has any completions in framework

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: User with credits

FIELD.NAME: credits
FIELD.COMMENT: Sum of obtained credits via completion, NULL means not calculated yet

FIELD.NAME: categorycompliant
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 if all category requirements are met, 0 otherwise. Always 1 for frameworks with no category rules.

FIELD.NAME: subperiodcompliant
FIELD.COMMENT: NULL = no subperiods, 1 = all sub-periods pass, 0 = any fail

FIELD.NAME: subperiodalert
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 = closed sub-period window failed, needs admin review

FIELD.NAME: proratedcredits
FIELD.COMMENT: Prorated credit requirement. NULL = use framework requiredcredits.

FIELD.NAME: timereached
FIELD.COMMENT: Date when event that user reached required number of credits was triggered, may reset back to NULL later

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_ledger
TABLE.COMMENT: Audit ledger of all credit postings from external sources

FIELD.NAME: sourcetype
FIELD.COMMENT: e.g. external_submission, manual

FIELD.NAME: sourceinstanceid
FIELD.COMMENT: e.g. assignment submission id

FIELD.NAME: timecredited
FIELD.COMMENT: When the activity was actually completed

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: When this ledger record was created

FIELD.NAME: createdby
FIELD.COMMENT: userid of who created this record, 0 = system

FIELD.NAME: revokedtime
FIELD.COMMENT: NULL means active

FIELD.NAME: evidencejson
FIELD.COMMENT: Arbitrary JSON metadata

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_framework_category
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-category minimum credit rules for a framework

FIELD.NAME: categoryname
FIELD.COMMENT: Credit type name matching evidencejson.credittype

FIELD.NAME: mincredits
FIELD.COMMENT: Minimum credits required in this category

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_framework_subperiod
TABLE.COMMENT: Sub-period requirements within a credit framework cycle

FIELD.NAME: mode
FIELD.COMMENT: relative or absolute

FIELD.NAME: offsetdays
FIELD.COMMENT: Relative mode: days from allocation start

FIELD.NAME: lengthdays
FIELD.COMMENT: Relative mode: duration in days

FIELD.NAME: startdate
FIELD.COMMENT: Absolute mode: unix timestamp

FIELD.NAME: enddate
FIELD.COMMENT: Absolute mode: unix timestamp

TABLE.NAME: tool_mutrain_subperiod_category
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-category minimum credit rules within a sub-period
